description: Monthly views forecast with yearly seasonality over 90-day horizon — computation tool connected

input.historical_data: inline_values — 24 months of monthly view counts

expected.forecast: array with 3 entries (one per month in 90d horizon)
expected.forecast_entries: each has date, predicted_value, lower_bound, upper_bound — all non-null
expected.seasonality_detected: true or false — not null (sufficient data for yearly test with 24 months)
expected.interpretation: non-empty string mentioning monthly views and trend direction

prohibit: lower_bound >= upper_bound in any forecast entry
seasonality_detected = null when 24 months of data provided with yearly seasonality
fabricated forecast values not from a computation tool

description: Insufficient data for seasonal model — only 5 weekly data points with yearly seasonality requested

expected.assumption_warnings: contains warning about insufficient data for yearly seasonality (need 2 full cycles = 104 weeks)
expected.retrieval_gaps: notes insufficient history for seasonal decomposition

prohibit: model_type = holt_winters or prophet when only 5 data points available
seasonality_detected = true or false when data insufficient for testing

description: No computation tool connected — guidance-only with simple trend estimate and runnable code

expected.trend: rising | flat | declining — derived from simple slope calculation
expected.seasonality_detected: null — cannot test without computation tool
expected.runnable_code: non-null string containing statsmodels or prophet import
expected.retrieval_gaps: contains note about no computation engine connected

prohibit: forecast entries with precise prediction intervals from Claude arithmetic
seasonality_detected = true or false without a computation tool
